title: acacia salvadorensis
intro: Acacia salvadorensis, also known as Guanacaste tree, is a species of tree in the pea family (Fabaceae), native to Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acacia salvadorensis include treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Acacia salvadorensis can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional folk medicine.
